html:
The Hay Wall is the weakest of the four Walls, a craftable Item and a deployable Structure that prevents the player's and Mobs' movement. Once built, it can be repaired or upgraded to a second tier with another piece of Hay Wall or enough Cut Grass. It can be attacked and destroyed, leaving a destroyed Hay Wall. Hammering the wall will yield two Cut Grass from the second tier and one Cut Grass from other tiers. It has a maximum of 100 health and 50 health when first built before upgrades. The Hay Wall is highly flammable and one should exercise caution when fighting Red Hounds near it, or during a Reign Of Giants Summer. If burned, they will drop one Ash.

In the Shipwrecked and Hamlet DLC, Strong Winds can erode and destroy Hay Walls.

Recipe

×4

×2

×4

Trivia

  • Prior to the Moderately Friendly Update, walls could be repaired using healing items, such as the Honey Poultice.

Assets

  • Phase 3 90°
  • Phase 2 90°
  • Phase 1 90°
  • Half Destroyed 90°
  • Destroyed 90°

Gallery

  • Old Hay Wall
  • All Old Hay Wall tiers.
  • Build Wall interface.
  • All types of walls (not including DLC) built next to each other. In order, from outside to inside: Stone Wall, Thulecite Wall, Wood Wall, Hay Wall.
  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

“This seems like a bad idea.”
–Wilson, Examining a hay wall item.
“Hmmm. I wonder if these will burn.”
–Willow, Examining a hay wall item.
“Scratchy straws!”
–Wolfgang, Examining a hay wall item.
“Their defensive value is questionable.”
–Wendy, Examining a hay wall item.
“NOT VERY GOOD DEFENSES”
–WX-78, Examining a hay wall item.
“Hay bales.”
–Wickerbottom, Examining a hay wall item.
“I could sneeze it over.”
–Woodie, Examining a hay wall item.
“Pocket-sized wall pieces. Yup.”
–Maxwell, Examining a hay wall item.
“Not terribly heavy.”
–Wagstaff, Examining a hay wall item.
“Perhaps my föes will get löst in this hay.”
–Wigfrid, Examining a hay wall item.
“Some grass tied together.”
–Webber, Examining a hay wall item.
“Better than no wall...”
–Walani, Examining a hay wall item.
“Hay look, a wall!”
–Warly, Examining a hay wall item.
“Hope there arrr'nt any wild horses about.”
–Woodlegs, Examining a hay wall item.
“'TIS FOR WALL”
–Wilba, Examining a hay wall item.
“Hi, friends!”
–Wormwood, Examining a hay wall item.
“Swell. Nothing more durable than a wall of grass.”
–Wheeler, Examining a hay wall item.
“It's just a hay bale, really.”
–Winona, Examining a hay wall item.
“It's of no use there on the ground.”
–Wortox, Examining a hay wall item.
“Will huff and puff and blow wall down!”
–Wurt, Examining a hay wall item.
“You make do with what you have when you're in the wilderness.”
–Walter, Examining a hay wall item.
“These walls always seem to catch fire at the most inopportune moments.”
–Wanda, Examining a hay wall item.

Hammering the wall will yield two Cut Grass from the second tier and one Cut Grass from other tiers. It has a maximum of 100 health and 50 health when first built before upgrades. The Hay Wall is highly flammable and one should exercise caution when fighting Red Hounds near it, or during a Reign Of Giants Summer. If burned, they will drop one Ash.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tường Hay là tường yếu nhất trong bốn Tường, một Vật phẩm có thể chế tạo được và là một Công trình có thể triển khai để ngăn cản chuyển động của người chơi và Mob. Sau khi được xây dựng, nó có thể được sửa chữa hoặc nâng cấp lên tầng thứ hai bằng một mảnh Tường Hay khác hoặc đủ Cỏ Cắt. Nó có thể bị tấn công và phá hủy, để lại một Bức tường Hay bị phá hủy. Đập vào tường sẽ mang lại hai Cỏ Cắt từ tầng thứ hai và một Cỏ Cắt từ các tầng khác. Nó có tối đa 100 máu và 50 máu khi được chế tạo lần đầu trước khi nâng cấp. Bức tường Hay rất dễ cháy và người ta nên thận trọng khi chiến đấu với Chó Săn Đỏ gần nó, hoặc…

The '''Hay Wall''' is the weakest of the four Walls, a craftable Item and a deployable Structure that prevents the player's and Mobs' movement. Once built, it can be repaired or upgraded to a second tier with another piece of Hay Wall or enough Cut Grass. It can be attacked and destroyed, leaving a destroyed Hay Wall. [[Hammer]]ing the wall will yield two Cut Grass from the second tier and one Cut Grass from other tiers. It has a maximum of 100 health and 50 health when first built before upgrades. The Hay Wall is highly flammable and one should exercise caution when fighting [[Red Hound]]s near it, or during a ''Reign Of Giants'' [[Summer]]. If burned, they will drop one [[Ashes|Ash]].

In the ''Shipwrecked'' and ''Hamlet'' DLC, [[Strong Winds]] can erode and destroy Hay Walls.
__NOTOC__

{{Recipe |item1=Cut Grass |count1=4 |item2=Twigs |count2=2 |result=Hay Wall |resultcount=4}}
